zh.lifeSummary: 當Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester於1090年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾時，她的父親Robert Fitz Hamon45歲，母親Sybil de Montgomery24歲。她和Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester至少有7個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1157年9月29日在英國格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭布里斯托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester于1090年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾时，她的父亲Robert Fitz Hamon45岁，母亲Sybil de Montgomery24岁。她和Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester至少有7个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1157年9月29日在英国格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰布里斯托。

nameMeanings.name: Mabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname from the Old French vocabulary word amabel, amable ‘lovely’ (akin to modern English amiable ‘friendly, good-humoured’). The initial vowel began to be lost as early as the 12th century (the same woman is referred to as both Mabilia and Amabilia in a document of 1185 ), but a short vowel in the resulting first syllable was standard, giving a rhyme with babble, until the 19th century, when people began to pronounce the name to rhyme with table.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester was born in 1090, in Gloucestershire, England, her father, Robert Fitz Hamon, was 45 and her mother, Sybil de Montgomery, was 24. She had at least 7 sons and 1 daughter with Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester. She died on 29 September 1157, in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Bristol, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester est née en 1090, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Fitz Hamon, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Sybil de Montgomery, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille avec Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester. Elle est décédée le 29 septembre 1157, à Bristol, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Bristol, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester 1090 in Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Fitz Hamon 45 und ihre Mutter Sybil de Montgomery 24. Sie hatte mit Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 29. September 1157 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Bristol, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester è nata il nel 1090 nel Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Robert Fitz Hamon, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Sybil de Montgomery, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia con Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester. Morì il 29 settembre 1157, nel Bristol, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Bristol, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucesterが1090年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert Fitz Hamonは45歳，母Sybil de Montgomeryは24歳であった。彼女はRobert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucesterとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1157年9月29日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリストルで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブリストルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester(이)가 1090년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Fitz Hamon(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sybil de Montgomery(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1157년 9월 29일 영국 그루스스터실르 브리스톨에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 브리스톨에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester nasceu em 1090, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Fitz Hamon, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Sybil de Montgomery, tinha 24 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha com Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester. Ela faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1157, em Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Bristol, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester родилась в 1090 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Fitz Hamon было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybil de Montgomery, 24. У неё было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь от Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester. Она умерла 29 сентября 1157 г. в местности бристол, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности бристол, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester nació en 1090, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Fitz Hamon, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Sybil de Montgomery, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija con Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1157, en Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Bristol, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
